title: OS Command Injection
description: Passing user-controlled data to OS command execution APIs without sanitization leads to command injection (OWASP A03:2021 / CWE-78). Attackers can execute arbitrary system commands.

finding.message: OS command execution sink '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}. Verify no user input reaches this call.

references: Use array-form subprocess calls (no shell=True) in Python; never pass user input in the command string.
Whitelist acceptable command arguments; reject anything containing shell metacharacters.
Prefer library APIs over shelling out when possible (e.g., use the zipfile module instead of calling unzip).
OWASP OS Command Injection Defense Cheat Sheet.
